notes: Timeline based on user-confirmed music interpretation.
Use these timings as the source of truth before wiring the Goal Completion scenario.
The puzzle reveal should rebuild piece-by-piece, preferably in the order the player assembled it.

sections.label: Intro
sections.intent: Opening/arrival beat. Existing intro timing is considered correct.

sections.label: Charge
sections.intent: Build tension before the completed puzzle reveal.

sections.label: Puzzle Reveal
sections.intent: Rebuild the solved puzzle piece by piece, ideally in the player's assembly order.

sections.label: Time Taken
sections.intent: Show time taken, letter by letter.

sections.label: Checks Sent/Received
sections.intent: Show checks sent/received, letter by letter.

sections.label: Bonus/Malus Received
sections.intent: Show bonus/malus received, letter by letter.

sections.label: Total Completion Line
sections.intent: Show Total Completion and the formatted percentage on one line.

sections.label: The End
sections.intent: Show The End until the end of the music.

implementation_hints.time_source: AudioStreamPlayer.get_playback_position() plus mix offset if needed.
implementation_hints.puzzle_reveal_order: Store solved snap order during gameplay; fallback to stable row-major piece order if no history exists.
implementation_hints.typewriter: Compute visible character count from elapsed / duration for each event.
